title: Intelligent Invoice Processing Agent
description: A manufacturing company receives 5,000+ supplier invoices per month via email and EDI. The current manual process takes 3 days per invoice. The company wants to automate: (1) extracting invoice fields (vendor, amount, PO number, line items), (2) matching invoices to open purchase orders in SAP, (3) detecting discrepancies (quantity/price mismatch), (4) routing invoices over $50,000 for human approval, and (5) posting approved invoices to SAP. The solution must handle PDFs, scanned images, and structured EDI formats with 99%+ field extraction accuracy.
architecture_notes: Trigger: Azure Logic Apps monitor an Exchange mailbox and Azure Blob Storage for new invoice files. Extraction: Azure AI Document Intelligence (prebuilt invoice model) extracts structured fields — vendor ID, invoice number, PO reference, line items, amounts, dates — with confidence scores. Orchestration: Azure AI Agent Service InvoiceAgent receives the extracted data, uses a Code Interpreter tool to calculate line item totals and compare against SAP PO data (retrieved via Azure Functions calling the SAP REST API). The agent uses Azure AI Search over a vendor history index to detect anomalous pricing patterns (hybrid search: BM25 + semantic reranking against historical invoices). Discrepancy handling: InvoiceAgent calls a DiscrepancyClassifierTool to categorize issues (quantity mismatch, price variance, missing PO). For invoices over $50,000 or with unresolvable discrepancies, the agent creates a Power Automate approval request routed to the AP manager — a HITL gate before SAP posting. Approved invoices: InvoiceAgent calls Azure Functions to post to SAP GL. State management: Cosmos DB stores invoice processing state, discrepancy details, and approval audit trail with TTL for GDPR compliance.
key_patterns: Azure AI Document Intelligence for structured extraction from PDFs and images
Azure AI Agent Service for orchestration and business rule application
Azure AI Search hybrid search for anomaly detection against vendor history
Code Interpreter tool for financial calculations and PO matching
Power Automate HITL approval for high-value or discrepant invoices
Cosmos DB saga state for multi-step invoice lifecycle
Azure Functions as SAP integration adapter
Confidence score thresholds to route low-confidence extractions to human review
